steps.title: Identify the central idea
steps.content: The passage begins with hagfish slime threads, then focuses on Sato's team trying to recreate those strong, elastic threads as an eco-friendly alternative to petroleum-based fabric fibers.

steps.title: Connect slime to fabric
steps.content: The matching choice states that hagfish threads might help researchers create a new kind of fabric. Choice B wrongly says the new fabric is petroleum-based, Choice C focuses on captivity logistics, and Choice D shifts to the hagfish's jawless body. The answer is A.
